allow:
Bash(python3 - <<'PYEOF'
import json

with open\('/tmp/lighthouse-report3.json'\) as f:
    r = json.load\(f\)

a11y = r['categories']['accessibility']
score = round\(a11y['score'] * 100\)
print\(f'Accessibility Score: {score}/100\\n'\)

audits = r['audits']
failed, passed = [], []

for ref in a11y['auditRefs']:
    audit = audits.get\(ref['id']\)
    if not audit:
        continue
    s = audit.get\('score'\)
    mode = audit.get\('scoreDisplayMode'\)
    if mode in \('manual', 'notApplicable', 'informative'\):
        continue
    if s == 0:
        failed.append\(audit\)
    elif s == 1:
        passed.append\(audit\)

print\(f'FAILED \({len\(failed\)}\):'\)
for a in failed:
    print\(f"  [FAIL] {a['id']}"\)
    print\(f"         {a['title']}"\)
    items = \(a.get\('details'\) or {}\).get\('items', []\)
    for item in items[:3]:
        node = item.get\('node'\) or item.get\('element'\) or {}
        snippet = node.get\('snippet', ''\)
        if snippet:
            print\(f"         -> {snippet[:120]}"\)

print\(f'\\nPASSED \({len\(passed\)}\):'\)
for a in passed:
    print\(f"  [PASS] {a['id']}"\)
PYEOF)
